channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Virtual Housing Fair
item.description: Date: Thursday, May 7, 2026 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM - Still need off campus housing for the 26-27 academic year? Several Property owners will be available to meet and discuss what openings they have. Staff will also be available from Off-Campus Services to answer questions. join us on our Discord Server.
item.author: Students

item.title: Finals Week Dining Specials
item.description: Join Rensselaer Dining for these specials across campus while you study or take a break from Finals! Brain Food - Mindful specials curated just for finals snacking. Available on rotation throughout the week at Commons. Late Night Library - Free coffee and cookies available at Library Cafe May 4th - 7th from 6pm-10pm while supplies last! Finals Survival Kits - available at Father’s throughout Finals Week! For more details, check out @RensselaerDining on social media.
item.author: Students

item.title: Finals Week Dining Hours of Operations
item.description: As finals week kicks off, please click the link above for retail and dining hours of operations across campus from May 4th through May 8th. Be sure to plan ahead! Good luck on Finals!
item.author: Students

item.title: SUMMER PARKING PERMITS NOW AVAILABLE
item.description: Summer 26’ parking permits are now available. Please visit rpi.aimsparking.com to purchase. Any questions please reach out to parking and transportation
item.author: Community

item.title: Call for Fall 2026 NRB Beyond Blocks
item.description: Through Beyond Blocks, students participate in open houses, club fairs, workshops, and social events that help them stay connected, get involved, and thrive in their new environment. Submit an event: https://surveys.rpi.edu/jfe/form/SV_ers5JWvVJ7QSmjQ Questions? Contact fye@rpi.edu
item.author: Community

item.title: Don’t Forward Threats, Report Them!
item.description: Our Information Security team has experienced an increase of potential Scam and Phishing emails that are being forwarded or sent throughout the RPI Community. If an email does not appear legitimate or doesn’t seem right - Report, Don’t Forward!
item.author: Community

item.title: Fidelity Confidential Consultation (By Phone with Zoom Video Option)
item.description: Date: Thursday, May 7, 2026 8:00 AM - 4:30 PM - Schedule a confidential consultation to help you become better informed and more confident about your workplace retirement savings plan benefits. To schedule an appointment, call 1-800-642-7131, Monday through Friday, 8:00 am to midnight, or online at https://nb.fidelity.com/public/nbpreloginnav/rpi/microsite/#/tem/meet-with-us
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Heliocampus Summer 2026 Syllabus Available - Complete by June 1
item.description:
The HelioCampus syllabus module is now available for faculty to access for the summer. Based on the requirements from the Provost’s office, faculty should have their syllabi published in HelioCampus by June 1, 2026. HelioCampus will publish all syllabi automatically on June 8, 2026.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
